query:
SELECT 
  a.repair_intelligence_json,
  a.parts_cost,
  a.labor_cost,
  a.estimated_parts_cost,
  a.estimated_labor_cost,
  a.currency_code,
  a.total_loss_indicated,
  a.repair_to_value_ratio,
  a.estimated_vehicle_value,
  a.physics_deviation_score
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.claim_id = '2730001'
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute

  a.currency_code,
  a.total_loss_indicated,
  a.repair_to_value_ratio,
  a.estimated_vehicle_value,
  a.physics_deviation_score
FROM ai_assessments a
WHERE a.claim_id = '2730001'
LIMIT 1;
